description_long: This object is a set of three combat or utility knives, each featuring a straight-edged blade with a tanto-style tip and partial serration near the handle. The top knife displays a gradient coloration on the blade, transitioning from blue to gold, and has a black handle with a blue guard. The middle knife is entirely matte black, including both blade and handle, with a subtle guard. The bottom knife has a gold blade and a light gray handle with metallic rivets. All three knives have holes in the blade for weight reduction and visual style, and the handles are straight with minimal contouring. The overall design suggests durability and functionality, with a modern, tactical aesthetic suitable for urban or survival scenarios.
description: A trio of modern tanto-style knives with straight, partially serrated blades and straight handles in black, gray, and gradient metallic finishes.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the slim profiles and thickness of the three knives, highlighting the blade edges and handle shapes.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the blades, color variations, serrations, and handle details for all three knives.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view emphasizing the blade spines and the alignment of the handles, with visible color transitions and rivet placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view of the knives, showing the other face of the blades and handles, with clear visibility of the blade holes and serrations.
attribute_handle_design: straight, plastic or metal, minimal contour, visible rivets on one handle, smooth finish
attribute_ornamentation: gradient blade coloration, blade holes, colored guard
